prompt: Translate this English proverb into two other languages in a way that preserves the spirit, not the words: 'The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now.' Add a one-sentence note on each.
response:
Spanish: "El mejor momento para plantar un árbol fue hace veinte años. El segundo mejor momento es ahora." Note: This proverb emphasizes the importance of taking action and not delaying important tasks.

French: "Le meilleur moment pour planter un arbre était il y a vingt ans. Le deuxième meilleur moment est maintenant." Note: This proverb encourages us to act promptly and not wait for the perfect moment, as it may never come.
